Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 1, 043 [list of diseases][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

ul-tu lib₃-bi ⸢GAZ lib₃⸣-bi

(o 1) From the belly (comes): distress.

o 22

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> lib₃-bi AN.TA.ŠUB.BA

(o 2) Ditto (from the belly comes): "falling sickness".

o 33

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> lib₃-bi ŠU ⸢DINGIR⸣.RA

(o 3) Ditto (from the belly comes): hand of a god.

o 44

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> lib₃-bi ŠU d⸢INANA.NA⸣

(o 4) Ditto (from the belly comes): hand of Ištar.

o 55

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> lib₃-bi be-⸢en⸣-nu

(o 5) Ditto (from the belly comes): epilepsy.

o 66

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> lib₃-bi d⸢LUGAL—UR₃.RA⸣

(o 6) Ditto (from the belly comes): Bel-uri.

o 77

ul-tu KA.⸢BUN₂?⸣-šu₂ mu-⸢ru⸣-uṣ SAG.DU  ; u pi-[i]

(o 7) From his nostril (come) disease(s) of: the head and the mouth.

o 88

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> KA.⸢BUN₂?⸣-šu₂ mu-⸢ru⸣-uṣ pi-i šin-nu ⸢bu-uʾ⸣-ša₂-nu

(o 8) Ditto (from his nostril come disease(s) of): mouth (and) tooth, (that is) būšānu-disease.

o 99

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> KA.⸢BUN₂?⸣-šu₂ mu-⸢ru⸣-uṣ KEŠ₂ x MU

(o 9) Ditto (from his nostril comes disease of): ....

o 1010

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> KA.⸢BUN₂?⸣-šu₂ mu-⸢ru⸣-uṣ dDIM₃.ME!(PI)

(o 10) Ditto (from his nostril comes disease from): Lamaštu.

o 1111

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> KA.⸢BUN₂?⸣-šu₂ mu-⸢ru⸣-uṣ pa-šit-⸢tu₄ :⸣ mar-tu₄

(o 11) Ditto (from his nostril comes disease of): pāšittu-illness : gall.

o 1212

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> KA.⸢BUN₂?⸣-šu₂ mu-⸢ru⸣-uṣ ŠU x-me-e

(o 12) Ditto (from his nostril comes disease of): hand of ....

o 1313

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> KA.⸢BUN₂?⸣-šu₂ mu-⸢ru⸣-uṣ ŠU ⸢GIDIM⸣.MA

(o 13) Ditto (from his nostril comes disease of): hand of a ghost.

o 1414

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> KA.⸢BUN₂?⸣-šu₂ mu-⸢ru⸣-uṣ maš-ka-du

(o 14) Ditto (from his nostril comes disease of): maškadu-illness.

o 1515

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> KA.⸢BUN₂?⸣-šu₂ mu-⸢ru⸣-uṣ mi-šit-ti

(o 15) Ditto (from his nostril comes disease of): stroke.

o 1616

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> KA.⸢BUN₂?⸣-šu₂ mu-⸢ru⸣-uṣ ⸢a⸣-šu-u₂

(o 16) Ditto (from his nostril comes disease of): ašû-illness.

o 1717

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> KA.⸢BUN₂?⸣-šu₂ mu-⸢ru⸣-uṣ gi-iṣ-ṣa-tu₄

(o 17) Ditto (from his nostril comes disease of): kiṣṣatu-illness.

o 1818

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> KA.⸢BUN₂?⸣-šu₂ mu-⸢ru⸣-uṣ ḫi-miṭ U₄.⸢DA⸣ x? nap-ḫar mur-ṣu

(o 18) Ditto (from his nostril come disease(s) of): heat stroke ..., all illnesses.

Reverse
r 1r 1

[ul]-⸢tu⸣ ḫa-še-e BI::LU

(r 1) From the lungs (comes): būšānu-disease.

r 22

[...] ši-i-qu

(r 2) [...]: šīqu-illness.

r 33

[...] ša₂-a-ri

(r 3) [...] of flatulence.

r 44

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> ḫa-še-e e-ze-zu

(r 4) Ditto (from the lungs comes): being angry.

r 55

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> ḫa-še-e bu-ša₂-a-nu

(r 5) Ditto (from the lungs comes): būšānu-disease.

r 66

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> ḫa-še-e ṣi-in-na-aḫ-tir

(r 6) Ditto (from the lungs comes): diarrhoea.

r 77

ul-tu ELLAG₂-MEŠ ḫi-niq₂-ti

(r 7) From the kidneys comes: constriction.

r 88

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> ELLAG₂-MEŠ ŠA₃.ZI.GA

(r 8) Ditto (from the kidneys comes): (problems of) sexual potency.

r 99

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> ELLAG₂-MEŠ DU.UR GIG.GA

(r 9) Ditto (from the kidneys): sore anus.

r 1010

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> ELLAG₂-MEŠ sa-gal-lu₄

(r 10) Ditto (from the kidneys comes): sagallu-illness.

r 1111

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> ELLAG₂-MEŠ la a-li-du-ti

(r 11) Ditto (from the kidneys comes): sterility.

r 1212

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> ELLAG₂-MEŠ ARḪUŠ ša₂ zi-i-ri

(r 12) Ditto (from the kidneys comes): compassion for hatred.

r 1313

KI.MIN<(ul-tu)> ELLAG₂-MEŠ ka-le-e TU₁₅

(r 13) Ditto (from the kidneys comes): retention of wind.

(colophon)
r 1414

GIM SUMUN-šu₂ SAR-ma ba-ri imGI₃.DA

(r 14) Written and checked according to its original. Oblong tablet of Rimut-Anu, son of Šamaš-iddin, descendant of Šangi-Ninurta, the incantation priest.

r 1515

[m]ri-mut—da-nu DUMU ša₂ mdša₃-maš—SUM.MU

r 1616

DUMU lu₂SANGA—dNIN.URTA lu₂MAŠ.MAŠ

r 1717

qa-at₂ mbe-lu—ka-ṣir DUMU ša₂ mDIN

(r 17) Hand of Bel-kaṣir, son of Balaṭu.
